TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tungpu_daigaz, title = Tungpu_daigaz, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tungpu_daigaz} }

S.FORM: alang Tungpu daigaz ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 98 buwan, 395 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 362 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 33 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 87%, Truku 1%, Amis 1%, Cou 1%, Paywan 2%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tungpu daigaz hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Tungpu daigaz hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tungpu daigaz hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tungpu daigaz hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tungpu daigaz hya' ga Ilausan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tungpu daigaz ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 98 buwan, 395 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 362 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 33 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 87%, Truku 1%, Amis 1%, Cou 1%, Paywan 2%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tungpu daigaz hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Tungpu daigaz hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tungpu daigaz hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tungpu daigaz hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tungpu daigaz hya' ga Ilausan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaЕӢ tuЕӢpu *aiЙЈaz ЙЈa nija mki s~Й•ku nanto keЕӢ atu s~Й•inК”ij ЙЈo, kwara s~Й•ali ОІuwan nja ЙЈa ** ОІuwan, *** Д§i ku kwara s~Й•К”uli tajan. s~Й•К”uli tajan pins~Й•pЕӢan ЙЈjenКҰ~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *** Д§i, ОІinaД§ ЙЈa, К”jat kaД§un s~Й•ku pins~Й•pЕӢan ЙЈjenКҰ~КЁumin ЙЈa *% kjan ku ** Д§i nja. pins~Й•puЕӢ na linД§ujan ЙЈjenКҰ~КЁumin ЙЈa, ОІunun **%, truku *%, amis~Й• *%, КҰ~КЁou *%, pajwan *%, s~Й•etik *%, ОІinaД§ liД§ujan s~Й•К”uli *%. maki qu ЕӢas~Й•al ОІziran. rД§zjal kkiК”an taj К”llaw na tuЕӢpu *aiЙЈaz Д§jaК” ЙЈa rЙЈjax kraД§uК”. taj К”zil na tuЕӢpu *aiЙЈaz Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕӢ. taj mkjaД§uК” na tuЕӢpu *aiЙЈaz Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕӢ. taj mkrajaК” na tuЕӢpu *aiЙЈaz Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕӢ. taj mkrajaК” na tuЕӢpu *aiЙЈaz Д§jaК” ЙЈa ilaus~Й•an. rekis~Й•i kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~Й•s~Й•quliq pinlpЙЈan ppqОІaqan pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” КҰ~КЁikuj pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” mrkjas~Й• tuqi К”s~Й•an ОІas~Й•u kis~Й•jaК” ЙЈlЙЈan s~Й•pjaЕӢan na pinОІaД§u uОІuj qqmajД§
